tools.name: get_agent_status
tools.description: Read current agent availability, wake timing, and next action.

tools.name: get_queue_summary
tools.description: Read queue, active, failed, and recent done task summaries.

tools.name: get_recent_failures
tools.description: Read recent failed tasks and blocked slots.

tools.name: get_latest_agent_logs
tools.description: Read latest observed log tails for each agent slot.

tools.name: get_mcp_capability_status
tools.description: Read MCP connector online/read-only/write capability status.

tools.name: get_mcp_feature_overview
tools.description: Read grouped MCP feature availability and known missing ops gaps.

tools.name: sync_repository
tools.description: Safely fast-forward sync the local orchestrator repository. Defaults to dry_run=false and ff-only helper behavior.

tools.name: requeue_task
tools.description: Move a task markdown file back to tasks/queue through the audited helper.

tools.name: fail_task
tools.description: Move a task markdown file to tasks/failed through the audited helper.

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Move a task markdown file to tasks/done through the audited helper.

tools.name: start_agent
tools.description: Start a selected agent slot once through the audited helper.

tools.name: rerun_agent
tools.description: Rerun a selected agent slot once through the audited helper.

tools.name: get_github_issues_cached
tools.description: Read cached GitHub issues from alex-place/gm-agent-orchestrator. Data is cached for 30 seconds.

tools.name: get_github_pr_status_cached
tools.description: Read cached GitHub PR metadata from alex-place/gm-agent-orchestrator. Data is cached for 30 seconds.

tools.name: get_github_pr_detail
tools.description: Read full detail for a specific PR: body, head SHA, branch names, mergeable state, file counts. Required for PR review.

tools.name: get_github_pr_files
tools.description: Read changed files list for a specific PR: filename, status, additions, deletions, and patch diff per file.

tools.name: get_github_pr_checks
tools.description: Read CI check run statuses for a specific PR's head commit: check name, status, and conclusion.

tools.name: get_github_pr_comments
tools.description: Read review and issue comments on a specific PR: author, body, file path and line for inline review comments.

tools.name: update_github_issue_comment
tools.description: Update an existing GitHub issue comment in alex-place/gm-agent-orchestrator through the guarded helper. Use dry_run=true before mutation.

tools.name: propose_powershell_patch
tools.description: Stage a PowerShell patch payload for later validation or promotion. Does not modify live files.

tools.name: validate_powershell_patch
tools.description: Validate a staged PowerShell patch with parser checks.

tools.name: promote_powershell_patch
tools.description: Promote a staged PowerShell patch with backup support. Defaults to dry_run=true.

tools.name: run_safe_powershell
tools.description: Run a PowerShell script safely through the orchestrator. For security, only pre-approved scripts can be executed by name.

tools.name: restart_mcp_server
tools.description: Schedule a guarded restart of this orchestrator MCP server. Defaults to dry_run=true and returns before any live restart.

tools.name: run_service_supervisor
tools.description: Run the local service supervisor once to check or start offline services. Defaults to dry_run=true.

tools.name: create_queue_task
tools.description: Create an orchestrator queue task through the audited queue helper. Use dry_run=true to preview.

tools.name: get_gamemaker_project_info
tools.description: Read GameMaker project metadata (name, version, resource count).

tools.name: get_gamemaker_compiler_errors
tools.description: Parse GameMaker compiler output and return structured error list with line numbers.

tools.name: get_sprite_asset_status
tools.description: Validate sprite imports, frame counts, and dimensions in the GameMaker project.

tools.name: get_room_editor_status
tools.description: Validate room layouts, object placements, and room structure integrity.

tools.name: get_game_build_status
tools.description: Aggregate build status: compiler errors, asset validation, room structure (all Phase 1 checks).

tools.name: get_git_status_summary
tools.description: Read current branch, changed files, staged files, and protected-branch status for the orchestrator repo.

tools.name: get_worktree_risk_summary
tools.description: Read git status plus a low/medium/high worktree risk assessment before mutations.

tools.name: create_branch
tools.description: Create and checkout a feature branch in the orchestrator repo. Refuses master/main. Defaults to dry-run.

dry_run.description: Preview the operation without changing git/GitHub state. Defaults to true for mutations.

tools.name: stage_files
tools.description: Stage explicit repo-relative file paths only. Refuses absolute paths, traversal, wildcards, and protected branches. Defaults to dry-run.

dry_run.description: Preview the operation without changing git/GitHub state. Defaults to true for mutations.

tools.name: commit_staged_changes
tools.description: Commit currently staged changes on a feature branch. Refuses master/main and defaults to dry-run.

dry_run.description: Preview the operation without changing git/GitHub state. Defaults to true for mutations.

tools.name: push_current_branch
tools.description: Push the current feature branch with upstream tracking. Refuses master/main and defaults to dry-run.

dry_run.description: Preview the operation without changing git/GitHub state. Defaults to true for mutations.

tools.name: open_pr
tools.description: Open a GitHub PR for the current feature branch using gh. Refuses master/main and defaults to dry-run.

dry_run.description: Preview the operation without changing git/GitHub state. Defaults to true for mutations.

conclusion.nextAction: Review tool descriptors, keep high-risk tool execution separately gated, and route Lantern clients through the normalized source catalog.
Keep this source held until endpoint, auth, and exposed tools are verified explicitly.

safety.recommendedPolicy: list tools, inspect descriptors, verify parameters, invoke minimum safe tool
